**Justification from domain first principles (since external retrieval failed):**

In the Knowles master-equation description of amyloid aggregation, the aggregate mass fraction follows a sigmoidal (autocatalytic + saturating) trajectory. Mechanistically, inhibitors act by one of a few modes: (a) **reducing the accessible fibril mass / plateau** (monomer sequestration, capping), and (b) **slowing microscopic rate constants** (elongation/secondary nucleation).
